data.title: 30-Year Treasury Yield Tops 4.50%, Raising Red Flags For Markets: 'Bond Vigilantes Are Voting Early,' Says Veteran Investor
data.description: Yields on longer-dated U.S. 30-year Treasury bonds have surpassed 4.50%, raising global alarm. 10-year yield up 63 bps since Fed meeting.

data.title: IBM Q3 Earnings: Software Revenue Jumps 10% On 'Great Momentum' In AI, But Consulting Revenue Comes In Flat, Infrastructure Revenue Falls 7%
data.description: IBM reports third-quarter revenue of $14.968 billion, missing the consensus estimate of $15.07 billion, according to Benzinga Pro. The company reports quarterly loss from continuing operations of 34 cents per share.

data.title: 12 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Moving In Wednesday's After-Market Session
T-Mobile Reports Strong Q3 Results: Service Revenues Grew 5% YOY, FCF Grew 29%, Raised FY24 Guidance
data.description: T-Mobile reports its third-quarter results after Wednesday's closing bell. Here's a look at the key figures from the quarter.

data.title: Freeport-McMoRan Scores A Solid Q3, Analysts Say: 'Benefit From High Copper And Gold Prices'
data.description: Freeport-McMoRan closed Wednesday's trading session 1.26% lower at $47.92 as the market further digested its third-quarter earnings results.
